headline: Quanta Services (PWR) Stock Looks Pricey On Cash Flow And Earnings
summary: Quanta Services stock has delivered a very large 5 year return of 623.0%, yet the current checks suggest the shares now trade at a premium, with both the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate and market multiples pointing to an overvalued picture. Over the last 5 years, Quanta Services has returned 623.0%, which puts a lot of past gains into the current share price and raises the bar for future returns to justify it. Expectations for continued project demand and cash flow...
